231.issue_title: State reconciliation for get_state: cycle/subphase awareness + typed snapshot API

cycles.goal: Introduce the dedicated mismatch exception and the single approved branch-safe read adapter.

deliverables.title: StateBranchMismatchError defined
deliverables.expected_result: StateBranchMismatchError exists as the dedicated branch-mismatch read contract.

deliverables.title: BranchValidatedStateReader added
deliverables.expected_result: BranchValidatedStateReader wraps IStateReader and rejects mismatched state.branch.

deliverables.title: Repository guard tests added
deliverables.expected_result: Repository tests cover both matched and mismatched branch loads.

cycles.exit_criteria: A mismatched branch load raises StateBranchMismatchError via BranchValidatedStateReader, and the repository tests lock both the accepted and rejected read paths.

cycles.goal: Apply the clean break to engine query methods and the engine-query tool callers.

deliverables.title: get_state clean break applied
deliverables.expected_result: get_state propagates StateBranchMismatchError without translation.

deliverables.title: get_current_phase clean break applied
deliverables.expected_result: get_current_phase remains a thin wrapper and propagates the same exception.

deliverables.title: git_tools direct exception handling updated
deliverables.expected_result: Engine-query callers catch StateBranchMismatchError directly and keep explicit operator guidance.

deliverables.title: git_pull_tool exception handling updated
deliverables.expected_result: Pull-time state sync handles StateBranchMismatchError directly.

deliverables.title: Clean-break tests updated
deliverables.expected_result: Engine and git tool tests assert the new exception contract instead of the removed translation shim.

cycles.exit_criteria: PhaseStateEngine no longer translates branch mismatch to FileNotFoundError, and the engine-query git tools handle StateBranchMismatchError directly while preserving the current explicit operator guidance.

cycles.goal: Introduce the read-side core types without changing consumer behavior yet.

deliverables.title: WorkflowStatusDTO added
deliverables.expected_result: WorkflowStatusDTO exists in the state package, not in schemas.

deliverables.title: IGitContextReader contract added
deliverables.expected_result: IGitContextReader exists as the resolver-facing git metadata contract.

deliverables.title: CommitPhaseDetector added
deliverables.expected_result: Commit-only detector wraps ScopeDecoder with fallback_to_state=False.

deliverables.title: WorkflowStatusResolver added
deliverables.expected_result: Resolver depends only on IGitContextReader, IStateReader, and CommitPhaseDetector.

deliverables.title: Resolver tests added
deliverables.expected_result: Resolver behavior is covered before consumer migration.

cycles.exit_criteria: The DTO, interface contract, detector, and resolver exist together as an independently testable read-side core with no consumer adoption mixed into the same cycle.

cycles.goal: Move only the researched user-facing consumers to the new resolver and wire them through the composition root.

deliverables.title: ProjectManager uses resolver
deliverables.expected_result: get_project_plan stops assembling workflow status locally and uses WorkflowStatusResolver.

deliverables.title: GetWorkContextTool uses resolver
deliverables.expected_result: GetWorkContextTool uses the resolver and gates cycle enrichment on current_cycle is not None.

deliverables.title: Resolver wiring added to composition root
deliverables.expected_result: Resolver and branch-validated state reader are injected consistently from the composition root.

deliverables.title: Consumer migration tests updated
deliverables.expected_result: User-facing consumer migration is fully covered.
Tests updated because GetProjectPlanTool stubs the manager response shape and ProjectManager gains a new required constructor argument.
deliverables.title: project_tools tests updated for resolver wiring

cycles.exit_criteria: ProjectManager and GetWorkContextTool consume one shared resolver, duplicate local workflow-status assembly is removed, and server/test wiring provides the new dependencies through the composition root.

cycles.goal: Move QA baseline persistence out of workflow state and into its own typed file-backed repository.

deliverables.title: QualityState model added
deliverables.expected_result: QualityState exists as the dedicated QA baseline payload.

deliverables.title: IQualityStateRepository contract added
deliverables.expected_result: IQualityStateRepository exists as the dedicated QA-state persistence contract.

deliverables.title: Quality state repository added
deliverables.expected_result: quality_state.json reads and writes go through one repository abstraction.

deliverables.title: QAManager migrated to quality state
deliverables.expected_result: Baseline and failed-files logic no longer read or write workflow-owned QA data in state.json.

deliverables.title: quality_state.json marked branch-local
deliverables.expected_result: quality_state.json is treated as a branch-local artifact.

deliverables.title: QAManager state split tests updated
deliverables.expected_result: QAManager tests assert the split state ownership.

deliverables.title: submit_pr branch-local artifact behavior covered
deliverables.expected_result: PR submission flow neutralizes or protects quality_state.json exactly as branch-local policy requires.

cycles.exit_criteria: QA baseline state is isolated behind IQualityStateRepository, QAManager no longer mutates workflow-owned QA fields, and the submit-PR integration path recognizes quality_state.json as branch-local state.

cycles.goal: Move workflow writes and hook writes behind one coordinated mutator boundary.

deliverables.title: IWorkflowStateMutator contract added
deliverables.expected_result: IWorkflowStateMutator exists as the command-side workflow mutation contract.

deliverables.title: StateMutationConflictError added
deliverables.expected_result: Dedicated mutation conflict error exists with diagnostic and recovery fields.

deliverables.title: WorkflowStateMutator added
deliverables.expected_result: Command-side workflow writes use one coordinated mutation seam.

deliverables.title: PhaseStateEngine command paths routed through mutator
deliverables.expected_result: Initialize, transition, cycle operations and implementation hooks route through the mutator.

deliverables.title: Mutator wiring added to composition root
deliverables.expected_result: Composition root injects the mutator instead of leaving ad hoc save paths.

deliverables.title: Mutator tests updated
deliverables.expected_result: Workflow write-path tests assert coordinated mutation behavior.

cycles.exit_criteria: Workflow command paths and implementation hooks write through IWorkflowStateMutator, conflicts surface through the dedicated error type, and no ad hoc workflow save path remains in the touched engine slice.

cycles.goal: Surface write conflicts explicitly through the phase, cycle, and quality tools.

deliverables.title: Phase tool conflict feedback added
deliverables.expected_result: Phase tools return ToolResult.error and emit RecoveryNote on mutation conflicts.

deliverables.title: Cycle tool conflict feedback added
deliverables.expected_result: Cycle tools expose the same operator-facing conflict behavior.

deliverables.title: Quality tool conflict feedback added
deliverables.expected_result: Quality tool surfaces quality-state mutation conflicts explicitly.

deliverables.title: Conflict feedback tests updated
deliverables.expected_result: Tool-layer tests lock the operator feedback contract across phase, cycle, and quality tools.

cycles.exit_criteria: All three tool families convert mutation conflicts into explicit operator-facing errors with recovery guidance, and the corresponding unit tests lock that contract.

cycles.goal: Remove every legacy remnant left behind by the previous seven cycles.

deliverables.title: Translation and fallback remnants removed
deliverables.expected_result: No FileNotFoundError translation shim, constructor fallback compatibility layer, or stale branch-mismatch assumption remains.

deliverables.title: Legacy tests and helpers removed or rewritten
deliverables.expected_result: Obsolete tests and helpers for removed translation or fallback behavior are deleted or rewritten.

deliverables.title: Temporary seams and dead helpers removed
deliverables.expected_result: No unused seams, dead helper code, or stale temporary wiring remain.

deliverables.title: Final focused verification completed
deliverables.expected_result: The branch is ready to enter implementation with no known legacy baggage.

cycles.exit_criteria: Grep, focused tests, and branch quality gates show no remaining legacy translation, fallback constructor shape, stale helper, or obsolete test assumption in the touched slice.
